'''Vosadii''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]]. [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin]], a [[Bossban]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]], was a member of this clan. The Vosadiis were among the few clans that could trace their lineage back to [[Varl/Legends|Varl]], the home of the ancient [[Hutt Empire]] from [[Before the Republic|before the]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]; thus, they were known to be one of the [[Clans of the Ancients]], along with [[Bareesh]], [[Gorensla/Legends|Gorensla]], [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]], and others. [[Gormo Vosadii Grasso]] was dishonored among the Vosadii for a botched [[Spice/Legends|spice]] smuggling enterprise.
